series_metadata.series_title: Application for Refund of Cigarette Excise Tax
series_metadata.series_description: This form allows wholesalers to recover cigarettes returned to the manufactureres for an illegal or erroneous payment or assessment, or for unused tax stamps or metere impressions.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 3 years after the end of the calendar year. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain for 3 years after the end of the calendar year., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
